package.name: robomaster_camera
package.description:
Video acquisition from the physical RoboMaster EP: decodes the H.264 stream off the SDK's video port into sensor_msgs/Image + CameraInfo.
The real-robot opposite number of robomaster_gazebo's camera sensor, and the producer robomaster_detection consumes. Split out of robomaster_driver because that package must be ament_cmake for the C++ hardware plugin, which has no console_scripts — this is ament_python, so the node is a real entry point instead of a wrapper script.
